content.alt: Content-status chart with complete, missing, pointer, and size-mismatch file counts.
content.caption: Local availability check for the `ds000001` first-batch plan on this machine.
content.title: Local integrity evidence

conversion.alt: Subject-safe split chart showing train, validation, and test allocation counts.
conversion.caption: `ds000001` split plan derived from 16 subjects and 80 candidate BOLD recordings.
conversion.code: qortex convert data/ds000001 artifacts/ds000001 --format parquet --split subject
conversion.title: Conversion evidence

dataset.alt: Bar charts showing OpenNeuro ds000001 file suffix counts and bytes by BIDS datatype.
dataset.caption: Real `Dataset.manifest()` output from OpenNeuro ds000001: suffix counts and bytes by BIDS datatype.
dataset.title: Dataset evidence

events.alt: Timeline of ds000001 events and trial-type counts for subject 01 run 01.
events.caption: Real `events.tsv` timeline for ds000001 sub-01 run-01.
events.title: Event-table evidence

metadata.alt: Histogram of participant ages and bar chart of sex values from ds000001 participants.tsv.
metadata.caption: Real `participants.tsv` loaded through `Dataset.participants(prefer_api=False)`.
metadata.title: Metadata evidence

minimum.alt: Horizontal bar chart of the ds000001 first-batch download plan and file sizes.
minimum.caption: Real `minimum(goal='first-batch')` plan: metadata, sidecar, events, and one BOLD run.
minimum.title: Minimum-download evidence

model_sources.alt: Table of external medical-imaging model sources and the Qortex adapter path for each source.
model_sources.caption: Real external model sources Qortex can connect to through existing adapters or local plugin adapters. No prediction is shown here.
model_sources.title: NeuroAI model source evidence

neuroai.alt: Contract flow diagram from source profile to model contract, compatibility report, preprocessing plan, and artifact validation.
neuroai.caption: Qortex checks source metadata, model input contracts, required transforms, and artifact validation before model execution.
neuroai.code:
qortex neuroai run pipeline.yaml --artifact-dir docs/assets/results/neuroai/demo_artifact
qortex neuroai validate-artifact docs/assets/results/neuroai/demo_artifact
neuroai.title: NeuroAI contract evidence

neuroai_showcase.alt: Qortex segmentation showcase board with source slice, foreground candidate mask, overlay, contour, metrics, and class legend.
neuroai_showcase.caption: Real Qortex renderer output from the local `qortex_visual_test` T1w NIfTI and a source-derived foreground candidate mask.
neuroai_showcase.title: Segmentation artifact evidence

readiness.alt: Readiness chart for ds000001 showing subject count, recording count, and label-ready count.
readiness.caption: Real `CanTrainReport` for ds000001. Qortex separates candidate labels from locally confirmed training evidence.
readiness.title: Readiness evidence

visualization.alt: Axial BOLD slice from OpenNeuro ds000001 subject 01 run 01.
visualization.caption: Real BOLD axial slice streamed with `Dataset.stream_slice()` without downloading the full NIfTI file.
visualization.code: sl = ds.stream_slice(subject='01', modality='bold', run='01', time_index=0, axis=2)
visualization.title: Visualization evidence
